# AI Drug Discovery — Binding Affinity + ADMET

ML-driven drug-discovery platform. Predicts binding affinity, ADMET properties,
toxicity. Generative protein design with AlphaFold + RFdiffusion. Trained on ChEMBL,
BindingDB, PDBbind. Wet-lab feedback loop via LIMS / cloud-lab integration (Strateos).
GLP non-clinical preclinical studies. SiLA2 lab automation. IGSC sequence screening for synbio.
